problem id: 0334b2bf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01100011 -> 11010111
  10000111 -> 10110111
  11000101 -> 10000111
  11000001 -> 11100111
  11110111 -> 00110111
  11011011 -> 10010111
  11001100 -> 01011111
  01000001 -> 11100111

query: 01101010
predicted answer: 00001111
